The feeling has a home

Come home. Experience Fortica.

Our home above the clouds. A place where the city looks different, and the music feels twice as loud. Two days and two nights under the open sky, surrounded by nature and an energy you will never forget.

GOOD TO KNOW

Your guide for coming home

  • Choose comfort: The terrain is raw and rocky, so wear shoes that love the dancefloor as much as you do.
  • Layer up: Mostar’s heat is legendary, but you’ll want a cozy layer when the mountain breeze meets the sunrise.
  • Explore Mostar: The city’s soul is the perfect rhythm to start your day.
  • Stay hydrated: It’s a marathon of emotions, so take care of yourself and keep the energy flowing.
  • Respect the ground: We are guests of the mountain, leave nothing behind but your footprints and good vibes.
  • Take shuttle bus: Our organized buses are the best way to reach the top and back, let us drive so you can enjoy the night completely worry-free.

How to get to Fortica

Fortica sits above Mostar. Plan the route before the night starts, especially if you are arriving from outside the city.

Mostar entrance → Fortica hill

Recommended: shuttle bus

Organized buses will be announced with pickup points and return times.

At the roundabout at the entrance to Mostar from the Sarajevo direction, follow the signs toward Fortica hill.

The drive to the park takes roughly twenty minutes, depending on traffic and arrival time.

Open Fortica location and save it before heading out.

Fortica Mostar Open-air festival point above the city. Use the map for navigation and check back for shuttle bus updates.
